title: Can Boards and Portfolios be set up so that if all the subtasks are marked "Done", the task status automatically changes to "Done"?
excerpt:
Description
As  you complete the subtasks under a task, the task status doesn’t automatically change to “Done.” you have to make the change manually. Can that be done automatically rather than having to set up an automat…

posts.author: adavidoff (Amy Davidoff)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

As you complete the subtasks under a task, the task status doesn’t automatically change to “Done.” you have to make the change manually. Can that be done automatically rather than having to set up an automation?

What are you trying to achieve

Save time and make sure that Task and product status are accurate
